title: Xuan Yuan Sect
content:
It was only level 6 cultivation sect on earth planet that was  also country of its own.

Earth planet orbits 
Planet Tian Yun
, and was one of five special planets.

Xuan Yuan Sects ancestor was Xuan Ming who was past 
Ascendant
 stage cultivator.

Wang Lin
 stayed as Planet Tian Yun's messenger in this sect before going in the country of Ling Yue. During his time in this sect he was guided by 
Sun Yunshan
, young sect master of Xuan Yuan Sect.
